hooks.command:
cd "/Users/chunhuiliu/Moto-Claude Code/content-canvas" && AI_CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD -- 'api/*.js' 'app-v2.js' 2>/dev/null) && if [ -n "$AI_CHANGED" ] && [ -z "$(find ~/.claude/.cc-review-done -mmin -20 2>/dev/null)" ]; then jq -nc --arg f "$AI_CHANGED" '{decision:"block",reason:("⛔ 改了 AI 邏輯，還沒對完整 diff 做重工/一致性複查：
"+$f+"

對 git diff 跑完整審查、把報告給 Andrew 看過，touch ~/.claude/.cc-review-done 再停。push 等 Andrew 確認後才手動做。")}'; elif [ -n "$(git status --porcelain)" ]; then git add -A && files=$(git diff --cached --name-only | head -4 | tr '
' ' ' | sed 's/ $//') && git commit -m "wip: $files" && rm -f ~/.claude/.cc-review-done && echo "[已本機 commit，未 push] $files — 等 Andrew 確認後再 push 上 main"; fi
